thoughts_cikody_integration_276022901321.content: @kody commands in GitHub Discussion require a verb subcommand (full|rerun|fix|fix-ci|review|resolve|status) — bare @kody fails with 'Failed to parse command'.

facts_pipeline_verification_276024254556.content: A 'build' stage that only runs tests cannot verify pipeline structure (4 stages, PR creation) — a separate review or diff stage is needed to inspect the generated files and PR metadata.
